name: Revise for clarity
when_to_use: Tighten existing prose — cut clutter, fix murky sentences at the line and paragraph level

name: Copyedit
when_to_use: Mechanics, grammar, consistency, and house-style on an existing draft; preserve voice

name: Diagnose structure & impact
when_to_use: Find why a draft drags, buries the point, or fails to land — structure and persuasion gaps
